cases.title: Type 2 Diabetes with Hypertension
cases.symptoms: Persistent fatigue, increased thirst, frequent urination, blurred vision, elevated blood pressure readings
cases.diagnosis: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (HbA1c: 8.2%), Essential Hypertension Stage 2
cases.treatment: Metformin 500mg twice daily, Lisinopril 10mg daily, lifestyle modifications including diet and exercise

cases.title: Acute Myocardial Infarction
cases.symptoms: Sudden chest pain radiating to left arm, shortness of breath, nausea, sweating
cases.diagnosis: STEMI (ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction) - Anterior wall, Troponin I elevated (2.5 ng/mL)
cases.treatment: Emergency percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI), Aspirin, Clopidogrel, Beta-blockers, statins

cases.title: Pneumonia with Fever
cases.symptoms: High fever (39.8°C), productive cough with green sputum, chest pain on breathing, fatigue
cases.diagnosis: Community-Acquired Pneumonia (CAP) - Confirmed by CXR, Streptococcus pneumoniae positive culture
cases.treatment: Amoxicillin-clavulanate 875mg twice daily for 7 days, antipyretics, respiratory support monitoring

cases.title: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease Exacerbation
cases.symptoms: Increased dyspnea, productive cough, wheezing, chest tightness, reduced exercise tolerance
cases.diagnosis: COPD Stage III (severe), acute exacerbation, FEV1 35% of predicted
cases.treatment: Inhaled corticosteroids, long-acting bronchodilators, oxygen therapy, smoking cessation counseling

cases.title: Acute Gastroenteritis
cases.symptoms: Diarrhea 6-8 times daily, nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, mild fever (37.9°C)
cases.diagnosis: Viral gastroenteritis - likely rotavirus, mild dehydration, electrolyte imbalance
cases.treatment: Oral rehydration therapy, antiemetics (ondansetron), bland diet, supportive care, no antibiotics unless bacterial confirmed

cases.title: Asthma Attack in Adolescent
cases.symptoms: Sudden onset shortness of breath, wheezing, chest tightness, anxiety, peak flow 45% of personal best
cases.diagnosis: Acute asthma exacerbation, moderate severity, responsive to treatment
cases.treatment: Albuterol nebulizer treatment, systemic corticosteroids (prednisone 40mg), monitoring in ED, discharge with action plan

cases.title: Hypertensive Crisis
cases.symptoms: Severe headache, chest pain, shortness of breath, blood pressure 210/140 mmHg, altered mental status
cases.diagnosis: Hypertensive urgency with features of hypertensive emergency, target organ damage suspected
cases.treatment: IV labetalol, continuous monitoring, admission to ICU, investigation for secondary hypertension

cases.title: Acute Appendicitis
cases.symptoms: Right lower quadrant pain, fever (38.5°C), nausea, positive McBurney's point tenderness
cases.diagnosis: Acute appendicitis - confirmed by CT abdomen, WBC elevated (13,000/μL)
cases.treatment: Emergency appendectomy, perioperative antibiotics (cefoxitin), anesthesia, hospital admission for recovery

cases.title: Hypothyroidism with Weight Gain
cases.symptoms: Gradual weight gain despite diet control, fatigue, cold intolerance, dry skin, hair loss
cases.diagnosis: Primary hypothyroidism - TSH elevated (8.5 mIU/L), Free T4 low (0.8 ng/dL)
cases.treatment: Levothyroxine 50mcg daily, titration based on TSH levels, diet counseling, exercise program

cases.title: Hypoglycemic Episode
cases.symptoms: Sudden trembling, sweating, anxiety, confusion, tachycardia, blood glucose 54 mg/dL
cases.diagnosis: Severe hypoglycemia in Type 1 diabetic patient, likely insulin overdose
cases.treatment: IV dextrose 50%, glucagon IM if IV unavailable, frequent monitoring, insulin adjustment, patient education

cases.title: Acute Stroke (Ischemic)
cases.symptoms: Sudden facial drooping, arm weakness, speech difficulty, onset within 2 hours, time last known normal critical
cases.diagnosis: Acute ischemic stroke - MCA territory, NIH Stroke Scale 15, within thrombolytic window
cases.treatment: Alteplase (tPA) IV thrombolysis, CT angiography, neurology consultation, intensive monitoring, secondary prevention

cases.title: Urinary Tract Infection with Dysuria
cases.symptoms: Dysuria, urinary frequency, urgency, suprapubic discomfort, no fever
cases.diagnosis: Uncomplicated urinary tract infection - positive urine culture (>100,000 CFU/mL E. coli)
cases.treatment: Trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole DS twice daily for 3 days, hydration, follow-up urinalysis

cases.title: Severe Allergic Reaction (Anaphylaxis)
cases.symptoms: Acute onset urticaria, angioedema of face, stridor, wheezing, hypotension, loss of consciousness
cases.diagnosis: Anaphylaxis - likely food allergen (peanut), IgE-mediated reaction
cases.treatment: IM epinephrine 0.3mg immediately, IV access, H1 and H2 blockers, corticosteroids, observation 4-8 hours

cases.title: Chronic Hypertension Management
cases.symptoms: Asymptomatic, discovered during routine checkup, BP consistently 150-160/95-100 mmHg
cases.diagnosis: Essential Hypertension Stage 2 - no evidence of target organ damage on screening
cases.treatment: Amlodipine 5mg daily as monotherapy initially, dietary sodium restriction, DASH diet, weight loss program

cases.title: Anxiety Disorder
cases.symptoms: Persistent worry about various situations, difficulty concentrating, muscle tension, sleep disturbance
cases.diagnosis: Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) - GAD-7 score 18, no medical cause identified
cases.treatment: Sertraline 50mg daily, cognitive behavioral therapy, relaxation techniques, lifestyle modifications, follow-up at 2 weeks

cases.title: Acute Bronchitis
cases.symptoms: Persistent cough for 2 weeks, sputum production, mild dyspnea, chest discomfort, no fever
cases.diagnosis: Acute viral bronchitis - likely rhinovirus, no pneumonia on CXR
cases.treatment: Supportive care, cough suppressants (dextromethorphan), bronchodilator inhaler PRN, avoid antibiotics

cases.title: Hyperlipidemia with Cardiovascular Risk
cases.symptoms: Asymptomatic, family history of early MI, total cholesterol 290 mg/dL, LDL 180 mg/dL
cases.diagnosis: Primary hyperlipidemia - likely familial hypercholesterolemia, high CVD risk score
cases.treatment: Atorvastatin 40mg daily, ezetimibe 10mg daily, Mediterranean diet, aerobic exercise, lipid panel in 4 weeks

cases.title: Iron Deficiency Anemia
cases.symptoms: Fatigue, dyspnea on exertion, headaches, pallor, tachycardia, hemoglobin 8.2 g/dL
cases.diagnosis: Iron deficiency anemia - low serum ferritin (8 μg/L), low TIBC, likely due to chronic GI bleeding
cases.treatment: Oral iron supplementation (ferrous sulfate 325mg daily), dietary counseling, GI investigation for bleeding source

cases.title: Migraine Headache
cases.symptoms: Unilateral throbbing pain with aura (visual scotoma), nausea, photophobia, lasting 4-6 hours
cases.diagnosis: Migraine with aura, no secondary causes identified, tension-free interictal period
cases.treatment: Sumatriptan 50mg at onset, preventive therapy consideration (propranolol), lifestyle triggers identification, relaxation

cases.title: Diabetic Ketoacidosis
cases.symptoms: Polyuria, polydipsia, abdominal pain, Kussmaul respirations, fruity breath odor, altered consciousness
cases.diagnosis: Diabetic Ketoacidosis - pH 7.18, HCO3 12 mmol/L, glucose 680 mg/dL, positive serum ketones
cases.treatment: IV fluid resuscitation (normal saline), continuous insulin infusion, electrolyte replacement, ICU monitoring, identify precipitant
